title: turbinicarpus × ampliflorus
intro: Turbinicarpus × ampliflorus is a hybrid species of cactus, resulting from the cross between Turbinicarpus schmiedickeanus and Mammillaria elongata. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Turbinicarpus × ampliflorus are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
